facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 256 reviews. One bowl of Bún Quậy.

Bún Quậy Bạch Đằng on Đường Bạch Đằng is the kind of place locals go back to every week. The signature bún quậy, a Phu Quoc specialty you won't find back home, is why this spot keeps a near-perfect rating with zero marketing.

If you're skipping local noodle spots for resort restaurants, this is the mistake to fix first.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the noodles hit the bowl at Bún Quậy Bạch Đằng. 4.9 stars. 256 people didn't get it wrong. This is what Phu Quoc actually tastes like, and it's not on any resort menu.

Bún Quậy Bạch Đằng is the answer. Tag your travel buddy.
